resources.string: Something went wrong, tap to try again
Network error, tap to try again
Add this book to your library and read it any time.
Added this book to your Library
Removed this book from your Library
Install the app gallery or browser first
minutes to get a red packet
Deviation time between the system and the server is too large. Please calibrate the system time
You have never added any books to your Library yet
Are you sure to remove the book form your Library
The content and images are on behalf of authors’ personal views which are not related to %s. If you have any questions, please #Report# to us.
By continuing, you agree to #Terms of Service# and #Privacy Policy#

%s aims to provide a stage for writers to pursue their dreams , and a place to share their stories with a worldwide audience . It is our mission to make your voice heard . If you have a story to tell , %s is the place for you !
We offer a variety of rewards for authors who sign their stories with %s, including signing fee, story completion bonus, daily update rewards, and referral bonus. For more benefits, click #here#.
Send your writing to our email:
You could be the next best-selling author.
Newer version is available：fixed known bugs & optimized reading experience
Download locally at the same time
You will not be charged for chapters you have already unlocked
1. Bonus = 1 Coin. Bonuses will be deducted first when you unlock chapters.
2. Your user ID: #%s#. If the recharging fails or the recharge fails for a long time, you can click the Restore to resolve(no need to recharge). Or direct #feedback questions# to us.
4. Need help? Please look through our #FAQ#
3. Our default payment method is the Google Play payment platform. Google Play supports carrier billing, credit cards, gift cards, Paypal and Wallet balances.
5. The validity period of the Bonus gifted upon topping-up is 7 days.
6. Coins and bonuses have equal value, unexpired bonuses are virtual items and we do not support refunds.
7. To ensure the security of the digital assets in your account were recommend purchasing Coins with a third-party account: FB or Google account.
Support the author in creating more and better stories
Google play service is not available
Turn it off will affect your reading experience, make sure to turn it off or not.
No more chapters available for purchase
Top up and Unlock this chapter
Click to login for more services
Are you sure to switch the Language to %s?
E-mail / Phone number cannot be blank
Describe the issue you’re experiencing or leave your feedback.
Tips: Click to copy the address and visit with your computer browser.
The follow-up content is more interesting!
Tell us what you have found
If you believe the content infringes on your copyright.please #report# it to us.
There was an error in Google Play services. Please clear the Google Play cache or log back in to your Google account and try again!
If it still doesn\'t show up in your account after a while, or if you face any issues, please reach out to our #customer service# for help.
If you have any problems, please leave your #feedback# on Help Center.
The request failed, please try again later.
Book loading error, Please try another book.
Come back tomorrow to check in and claim your bonus.
The action cannot be undone. Please confirm the following information before you delete the account
1. You won\'t be able to reactivate your account

Once it is deleted, you won\'t be able to log in or use this account again. It is impossible to retrieve or dispose of any books, information, or assets related to the deleted account. Even if you re-register, only a brand new account will be created.
2. The property and information will be cleared

Deletion of the account will be regarded as you abandoning the account rights and assets.Including personal information, Coin, Bonus, Coupon, Top-up Card, and other virtual assets.Please properly handle your books, information and Assets.
You can’t successfully delete your account, if it has any unresolved disputes, including but not limited to complaints, reports, etc.
The Deletion application will be automatically reviewed and passed at 24:00 on the 30th day.But you can log in via a third-party account to terminate the process before finalizing.
I have read the above information and understand this action cannot be undone.
The account is under review for deletion. Are you sure you want to cancel the deletion?
The account deletion request has been submitted.
This request will be automatically reviewed and approved on %s.
Please confirm whether the account deletion agreement is selected.
The account is in normal condition.
The account deletion is being processed, please do not try again.
Account deletion has been submitted successfully.
Your account has been detected as deleted. A new account has been assigned to you, and the application will automatically restart for you to start using it.
You’ve successfully canceled the account deletion.

After clicking the \'Restore\' button, please be patient. If the recharge still doesn\'t show up in your account after a while, or if you encounter any issues, feel free to contact our customer service. We are always here to help you!
Google Pay currently does not support your purchase. Please try using an alternative payment method.
The operation is too frequent, please try again later.
You can earn bonuses by checking in every day. Additional rewards are granted on the 3rd and 7th consecutive check-ins. Interrupted check-ins will result in the loss of rewards for that day.
Complete the beginner\'s tasks to receive the corresponding bonus.

When you complete a Daily Tasks, click the"Claim" button to claim Bonus.This task is updated from time to time. If there are issues with bonus distribution due to updates, please leave your feedback on my page.
The bonus here is valid for 7 days. 1 Bonus = 1 Coin. Bonuses will be deducted first when you unlock chapters.
Network error, Please try again later.
The assets in your %s application will be used normally in the %s application. Please pay attention to changes in your assets.
The assets in %s include books in the bookshelf, %s coins and %s bonuses.
The account corresponding to the asset merger is under the %s account in the %s application.
Sign in and enjoy more free benefits
To ensure the utmost security for your account and data, please log in to your account; failing to do so may result in potential losses!
Sign in now and enjoy exclusive free benefits for newcomer
To unlock more features and benefits
Your account is at risk. Please log in promptly for account and data security.
Link your email to get a free bonus
Verification code has been sent, please check your email.
The account of this application has been bound to other accounts on the #%s# platform.
This login method has been bound to another account, do you want to switch account and merge your assets?
Select tags to recommend books to you more accurately
Swipe this area up and down to turn pages

We had a problem with your payment. To fix it quickly:

1. Open Google Play. 
2. Go to Payments & Subscriptions. 
3. Select Budget & History. 
4. Cancel the order, change the payment amount, or choose a different payment method.

We had a problem with your payment. To fix it quickly:
1. Open %s. 
2. Cancel the order. 
3. Change the payment amount or use a different payment method.
If you face any issues, please reach out to our #customer service# for help.
Your top-up is being processed and may be delayed by 5–10 minutes.
Your order is still processing. It’s taking longer than usual. Please hang in there a bit longer. If the payment doesn’t go through soon, you can try another method.
You have an incomplete payment order. Please try a different payment amountor choose another payment method.
Too many attempts, please try again later
Canceling will interrupt any incomplete payments.
The payment method is unavailable. Please try using an alternative payment method.
What should I do if the recharge is successful, but I didn\'t receive the coins?

Please confirm if the bank transaction was successful and if the payment has been deducted.If the payment has been successfully deducted, please reopen the application to check if the wallet and transaction history have been updated. 

 Important notes: 

 · Make sure you are logged in with the same account used for the recharge. Sometimes, users may forget their login credentials and recharge as a guest. 

 · According to the transaction process, it may take some time for the coins to be credited after a successful payment. The processing time may vary depending on the payment method. We recommend waiting for 10 minutes after a successful payment before checking if the wallet and transaction history have been updated. 

 If the above methods do not work, please contact us through "Feedback" to help us resolve your issue quickly.

· If an error message appears in the store, please check if your network is functioning normally. You can try changing your network environment, for example, using a different WiFi. 

 · In addition if you do not successful log in to Google and Apple accounts on your device, this problem mav also occur. 

 · If none of the above methods solve your problem, please give us feedback about the problem you encountered.
Can I request a refund after making the payment?
Refunds are currently not supported. Coins and bonuses can be used to unlock chapters.
How to disable the automatic purchase function?
You can disable it through \"My\"/\"Wallet\"/\"Books on Auto-unlock\".
How can I view the history of my chapter unlocks?
You can check it through \"My\"/\"Wallet\"/\"Consumption History\".
How to get my coins and bonus?
You can obtain coins and bonuses through recharge events, and participating in tasks in the welfare center can earn bonuses. Please note that coins can only be obtained through recharging.
What is the difference between coins and bonuses?
· Both can be used to unlock chapters. \n\n · Bonuses have a validity period. You can check the validity period of the bonus in the \"Bonus History\" of \"Wallet\".
How can I check my user ID?

Guest account 
 1. Click on "My Page". 
 2. A series of numbers on the right side of the avatar. 


 Already bound account 
 1.Click on "My Page". 
 2.Click on the avatar at the top to open a new page. 
 3.A series of numbers below the avatar.
Will assets synchronize when logging in on different devices?

You can quickly sync your assets by logging in with the same account. Here's how: 

 · Locate your previous device and log in with a third-party account (such as Google or Facebook). 

 · Remember your account's user lD and password. 

 · Log in with the same account on your new device. 

 · Make sure that the user lD number matches the one you recorded. 

 To ensure the preservation of your progress, we recommend completing your reading on the old device before switching to the new one.
For such error codes, we recommend updating Google Play services or using an alternative payment method.

· You may have logged into a different account. Please check your bonus receipt history to see if it has a continuous record. 

 · There are different login methods, such as Facebook, Google, and email address. If you haven't logged into any of the mentioned accounts, your device will have a visitor account. You can view your account on the "My" page. 

 · If your bonus has decreased, you can first check your bonus records; one possibility is that a portion of the bonus may have expired. 

 · You may have set up automatic unlocking. Please check your unlock chapter records to see if you have already spent some coins or bonuses. 

 · If the above methods do not resolve your issue, please send the problem to us through "Feedback".
You can view the consumption history of bonuses or coins in \"My\"/\"Wallet\"/\"Consumption history\".

We support both individual chapter unlocking and bulk unlocking. You can choose according to your needs. Unlocking will require the use of coins or bonuses. If your coin or bonus balance is insufficient, you will need to recharge.
· You need to make sure that your network connection is good. It is recommended to switch networks and then try again. \n\n · Please ensure that your coins or bonuses are sufficient.
Contact us through \"Feedback\" and provide the book title and chapter names to help us resolve the issue promptly.
Contact us through "Feedback" and provide the book title and chapter names. We will address it.
The books you purchase will always be your assets. If you delete any purchased books, you can retrieve them through \"My\"/\"Viewed\".

This situation typically occurs when you log in with different accounts or devices. Please ensure that you are logging in with your regular account. If the issue persists, please contact us for assistance via \"Feedback\".

log in: 
 1. Click on "My Page" 
 2. Click on the "avatar" 
 3. Select your preferred "login method" 


 Delete Account: 
 1. Click on "My Page" 
 2. Click on "Settings" 
 3. Click on "Delete Account"

string-array.item: What should I do if the recharge is successful, but I didn\'t receive the coins?
Can I request a refund after making the payment?

My coins or bonus are missing or reduced
What is the difference between coins and bonuses?
How do I check the usage history of my bonuses?

string-array.name: chapter_unlock_issues_item
string-array.item: How can I view the history of my chapter unlocks?
How to disable the automatic purchase function?
Unable to read the next chapter?

string-array.name: book_issues_item
string-array.item: Many contents are repetitive, with grammar or spelling errors.
Contains violent, insulting, and inappropriate content.
If I remove a paid book from my bookshelf, do I need to pay again?

string-array.name: account_issues_item
string-array.item: How can l check my user ID?
How can l log in/Delete Account?
Will assets synchronize when logging in on different devices?
My bookshelf records and gold coin assets have disappeared？

string-array.name: other_issues_item
string-array.item: Please contact us through \"Feedback\" to help us resolve the issue promptly.

resources.string: Still can\'t resolve the issue? Click on #Feedback#

string-array.name: subscribe_tips
string-array.item: How to get my coins and bonus?
My coins or bonus are missing or reduced
What is the difference between coins and bonuses?
How do I check the usage history of my bonuses?

resources.string: Log in for %d days to get %d bonuses
You got %d coins and %d bonuses. You can claim %d bonuses daily.
1. The purchase cost will be deducted from your payment account.

2. Your subscription will renew automatically. Subscriptions are automatically charged each billing period, whether monthly or another period. You may be charged no more than 24 hours before the beginning of each billing period until you cancel your subscription.
3. You may cancel a subscription at any time more than 24 hours before your renewal date.
4. The validity period of the Bonus gifted upon topping-up is %d days.
5. The bonus is distributed over seven days, and any unclaimed bonuses after expiration cannot be retrieved.
6. Coins and bonuses have equal value, unexpired bonuses are virtual items and we do not support refunds.
7. Need help? Please look through our #FAQ#.

1. You\'ll receive %s Coins and %s Bonuses immediately upon subscription.\n2. Log in for %s consecutive days to receive %s bonuses, i.e. %s Bonus per day.\n3. You can check the extra rewards in your Wallet after subscription.
The purchase cost will be deducted from your payment account.

Your subscription will renew automatically. Subscriptions are automatically charged each billing period, whether monthly or another period. You may be charged no more than 24 hours before the beginning of each billing period until you cancel your subscription.
You may cancel a subscription at any time more than 24 hours before your renewal date. To cancel the subscription, please go to the payment platform.
You can view, change, or cancel your subscriptions.
Ad loading, please try watching again later
Continue watching the ad after the countdown
Earn %d bonuses for each ad watched
%d bonus per video ad watched, completed %d/%d
Your annual membership is now active

1. Users who subscribe to Premium can enjoy free access to all Premium-exclusive books.
2. Payment: The purchase cost will be deducted from your payment account.
3. Renewal: Your subscription will renew automatically. Subscriptions are automatically charged each billing period, whether monthly or another period. You may be charged no more than 24 hours before the beginning of each billing period until you cancel your subscription.
4. Cancellation:You may cancel a subscription at any time more than 24 hours before your renewal date. To cancel the subscription, please go to the payment platform.
5. Billed weekly, valid for 7 days; Billed annually, valid for 365 days.
You can unlock this chapter by watch ad
You can unlock %d chapters for free today (%d/%d)
Enter the email you used for your account
Link your Facebook account to get more coins.Don\'t worry, you\'ll keep all your current progress and data linked to this account
Grab it now — all-time lowest price, limited time only!
Coins purchase was successful.The bonus is valid for 7 day(s).
We\'ve sent a 6-digit code to your #%s# email. Valid for 5 minutes. Please enter it.
6. If you need any help or have any questions, please let us know on our #Feedback#.
Ad unlock used up. Try again tomorrow
Thank you for supporting us!\nA quick rating would really help us grow.
Because of readers like you, we can continue bringing more emotional and inspiring stories to life.
1.Users who subscribe to Premium can enjoy free access to all books.
2. Payment:The purchase cost will be deducted from your payment account.

3. Renewal:Your subscription will renew automatically. Subscriptions are automatically charged each billing period, whether monthly or another period. You may be charged no more than 24 hours before the beginning of each billing period until you cancel your subscription.
4. Cancellation:You may cancel a subscription at any time more than 24 hours before your renewal date.To cancel the subscription, please go to the payment platform.

By continuing, you agree that your subscription will renew automatically. Subscriptions are automatically charged each billing period, whether monthly or another cycle. You may be charged up to 24 hours before the beginning of each billing period until you cancel your subscription. You can learn more about our cancellation and refund policy in the #Subscription Terms#.
After the intro period, your subscription renews automatically at the selected plan price. You can cancel anytime.
Continue reading and unlock the ending you\'ve been waiting for.
Unlock unlimited romance, fantasy, and werewolf stories with today\'s reader deal.
Continue the story now—and unlock thousands more like it.
